subject: Re: Reporty
body:
Hi Ehud,



Thank you for your time and patience in walking through my questions which I found very helpful.


Please find below my preliminary conclusions. 


Very evident that there is an unmet need in the marketplace and our World would be a much better & safer place with your solution.


·         The team has an impressive technical pedigree and I was also impressed with
 how driven and enthusiastic they appear to be


·         The technology appears to have a competitive advantage but you are in a far
 better position to judge this


·         In terms of looking at the financing, projections and operational rollout,
 I think there are some issues. In short my opinion is that the revenue projections seem somewhat ambitious in terms of timing and the cost side appears too low to me.They need  support on the business side.


·         The imminent pilot projects are clearly crucial to the company and as a consequence
 my suggestion  would be to defer or at the very least limit funding until there is further evidence  on proof of concept post these initial pilots as well as some of the other items I have flagged.


Hope this feedback is of help to you.


I look forward to getting your revised detailed business plan, which may well reshape these initial thoughts.  


 


Happy Hannuka and Happy Seasons


Best


Nicole
body_html:
Hi Ehud,

Thank you for your time and patience in walking through my questions which I found very helpful.

Please find below my preliminary conclusions. 

Very evident that there is an unmet need in the marketplace and our World would be a much better & safer place with your solution.

·         The team has an impressive technical pedigree and I was also impressed with how driven and enthusiastic they appear to be

·         The technology appears to have a competitive advantage but you are in a far better position to judge this

·         In terms of looking at the financing, projections and operational rollout, I think there are some issues. In short my opinion is that the revenue projections seem somewhat ambitious in terms of timing and the cost side appears too low to me.They need  support on the business side.

·         The imminent pilot projects are clearly crucial to the company and as a consequence my suggestion  would be to defer or at the very least limit funding until there is further evidence  on proof of concept post these initial pilots as well as some of the other items I have flagged.

Hope this feedback is of help to you.

I look forward to getting your revised detailed business plan, which may well reshape these initial thoughts.  

 

Happy Hannuka and Happy Seasons

Best

Nicole

subject: Re: Reporty
body:
Hi Jeff
Good conversation yesterday. To be continued on Monday after the CEO and his team will prepare more material. Darren & Nicole could also share impressions with you. 
My accountant in Israel insists that from IL tax code perspective it's important we will established our partnership as a US LLC. Can I introduce him to Darren so that we'll be well coordinated on this issue?
Secondly, I assume that by Monday evening we will be ripe for decision on the investment. Most probably a positive one. Pl make the proper preparations for such a case. 
Looking forward. 
Best
Happy Hanukah and Seasons. 
EB
